name: 故事讲述
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 语言表达 / Language / Language Arts
curriculum_points: Students will be able to identify and sequence the key elements (beginning, middle, end) of a story and retell it using appropriate expression (K-2).
Students will be able to create and present original narratives, using voice, gesture, and structure to engage an audience and convey meaning (3-5).
